76,111,103,32,105,110,116,111,32,115,101,114,118,101,114,13,10,69,110,116,101,114,45,80,83,83,101,115,115,105,111,110,32,100,97,116,97,115,97,110,45,102,115,13,10,13,10,13,10,76,105,115,116,32,81,117,111,116,97,32,84,101,109,112,108,97,116,101,115,32,111,110,32,83,101,114,118,101,114,13,10,71,101,116,45,70,115,114,109,81,117,111,116,97,84,101,109,112,108,97,116,101,32,124,32,83,101,108,101,99,116,45,79,98,106,101,99,116,32,45,69,120,112,97,110,100,80,114,111,112,101,114,116,121,32,78,97,109,101,13,10,71,101,116,45,70,115,114,109,81,117,111,116,97,84,101,109,112,108,97,116,101,32,124,32,83,101,108,101,99,116,45,79,98,106,101,99,116,32,78,97,109,101,44,32,83,105,122,101,13,10,13,10,76,105,115,116,32,102,111,108,100,101,114,32,108,105,107,101,32,13,10,100,105,114,32,45,70,105,108,116,101,114,32,104,101,110,100,101,114,115,111,110,97,110,100,42,32,45,68,105,114,101,99,116,111,114,121,13,10,13,10,83,104,111,119,32,113,117,111,116,97,32,102,111,114,32,102,111,108,100,101,114,13,10,71,101,116,45,70,115,114,109,81,117,111,116,97,32,45,80,97,116,104,32,36,80,87,68,32,124,32,70,111,114,109,97,116,45,76,105,115,116,13,10,13,10,67,104,97,103,101,32,113,117,111,116,97,32,102,111,114,32,99,117,114,114,101,110,116,32,102,111,108,100,101,114,32,13,10,82,101,109,111,118,101,45,70,115,114,109,81,117,111,116,97,32,45,80,97,116,104,32,36,80,87,68,32,45,67,111,110,102,105,114,109,58,36,102,97,108,115,101,13,10,78,101,119,45,70,115,114,109,81,117,111,116,97,32,45,80,97,116,104,32,36,80,87,68,32,45,84,101,109,112,108,97,116,101,32,34,78,97,109,101,79,102,89,111,117,114,84,101,109,112,108,97,116,101,34,13,10,13,10,65,99,99,101,115,115,32,114,105,103,104,116,115,32,105,110,99,46,32,105,110,104,101,114,105,116,97,110,99,101,32,111,110,32,99,117,114,114,101,110,116,32,102,111,108,100,101,114,13,10,40,71,101,116,45,65,99,108,32,45,80,97,116,104,32,36,80,87,68,41,46,65,99,99,101,115,115,32,124,32,83,101,108,101,99,116,45,79,98,106,101,99,116,32,73,100,101,110,116,105,116,121,82,101,102,101,114, into server
Enter-PSSession datasan-fs


List Quota Templates on Server
Get-FsrmQuotaTemplate | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name
Get-FsrmQuotaTemplate | Select-Object Name, Size

List folder like 
dir -Filter hendersonand* -Directory

Show quota for folder
Get-FsrmQuota -Path $PWD | Format-List

Chage quota for current folder 
Remove-FsrmQuota -Path $PWD -Confirm:$false
New-FsrmQuota -Path $PWD -Template "NameOfYourTemplate"

Access rights inc. inheritance on current folder
(Get-Acl -Path $PWD).Access | Select-Object IdentityReference, FileSystemRights, AccessControlType, IsInherited

Get-ChildItem | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending

query pc for logged in user
quser /server:Asset

net user USERNAME /domain
